message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Cindy
Kristy
《ＤＥＢＵＧ!!!》
I think someone was saying something.
But even without such a cue, it was a scene that could easily attract attention.
It felt like that.
Two women were coming down the central staircase. None other than Meryl Ann Kline and Jennifer Rumford.
Both are immensely popular actresses at the peak of their careers.
Meryl
I’m sorry for being late, everyone.
Meryl expressed her apology in a clear voice.
She proudly smiled as she glanced around at everyone attending the party.
In contrast, Jennifer kept her head down, looking a bit tired and silent.
《ＤＥＢＵＧ!!!》
Before long, the glamorous party was reaching its end.
Helipad to return to Manhattan.
Surprisingly, this director's residence has one.
On the way there, I came to take a last look at the room.
I wanted to see the room where that dreamy party took place one more time.
So this is where the party was.
The room was empty, the table pristine, just vast and spacious.
Here, just moments ago, I had spent time with various people, as if in a scene from a movie.
Detective!
As I turned around, Meryl was standing right in front of me.
Meryl
I saw you entering this room.
Do you need something?
Meryl
Hey, could you give me your contact information?
For the office, you mean?
Meryl
Of course. Well, there's something I've been pondering.
Got it. Here's the contact information for the office.
I handed over a card with the office address written on it like a business card.
Meryl
Thank you very much. Oh.
Chinatown?
Yes. The office is located there.
Meryl
That's different. Well, that's fine. Then.
Having settled her business, she left just as easily.
I wish there was a little more lingering feeling.
What lingering feeling?
Wow! That surprised me.
That's terrible, treating someone like a ghost or something.
No, I'm sorry. I didn't mean it that way.
I thought you were shaken up because you saw something bad.
W-what?
What were you talking about with Meryl?
Well, that's...
It's fine, though.
If you don't want me to spill about tonight's secret meeting with Meryl, you'll have to make me your detective assistant, okay?
A-are we talking about that again?
I won't give up! Please definitely hire me after I graduate!
Uhm.
Yeah.
Anyway, let's talk about
after graduation.
It's a bit vague, but well, let's let it slide as a step forward today.
Thank you very much.
Oh! I forgot the important thing. Guy is saying to hurry up, he's waiting in the helicopter.
Ah, that's right!

With the appearance of Meryl and Jennifer, the atmosphere became lively.
Both of them are wearing amazing dresses, making the previously flashy ones
look plain.
It seems like an illusion that the men's faces soften while women's faces stiffen.
I’m glad I could attend such a luxurious party.
Just don’t cause any problems.
I wonder why they’re working in a place like this.
No matter what, this is outrageous.
To not be intimidated in a place like this might not be an overstatement to call it a special skill.
Usually,
it seems like they’re talking, but they’re busily chatting with everyone.
Her posture of being attentive to everyone while not letting them get bored is wonderful.
Maybe she has never experienced a party purely meant for enjoyment before.
I feel like we’ve been making eye contact a lot since earlier.
Seeing her standing all alone makes me feel sorry.
Maybe it would be better to talk to her later.
But, there's no need for me to be concerned.
In reality, she might be a lonely person.
No matter when you look,
she's always perfectly attached to him.
I don’t really understand why she gets looked at sharply sometimes.
It’s like they say, 'Leave the gods alone, and you won’t be cursed.'
Seeing her spreading a lovely smile somehow feels painfully awkward.
Does she really look like she has a dark expression occasionally, or is it just my imagination?
She’s always next to him.
She is there.
Aside from sometimes talking with him,
it seems she keeps her distance from everyone.
Everyone either deliberately avoids talking to her,
or hasn’t really talked to her besides him.
Is she disliked?
She seems to be standing a bit away, watching them.
It looks like.
It’s not obvious from a distance, but she seems a bit tired.
As usual, he's glued to Guy.
It doesn't seem like there's a chance for her to get close to him.
The director isn't at fault, but
I wish he'd talk to everyone else once in a while.
Guy is chatting happily with the director.
After all,
he's probably deep in conversation with the director to avoid her.
She should at least
take a glance in my direction.
I've always been positioned between him and Guy. However, I've never had this much distance before.
Is she okay?
It's an honor to attend the party, but I've been staying away from events like this, so I'm really worn out.
If I get swept up in the party atmosphere, it'll be the end for me.
It's unusual for Director Fabar to gather such a luxurious cast, or so the rumors go.
I wonder why he chose this method this time around.
Since each of them has a distinctive face, it should be fun.
Is he still doing promotional work?
No way he's trying to pitch to Meryl or Jennifer too, right?
Even if he's not doing it with bad intentions, it might be seriously annoying for those around, including me.
He's not just acting out of spite because his target didn't come, right?
She must be a girl who grew up among adults since she was young. That explains her logical demeanor.
It's concerning how often our eyes meet; did I do something to irritate her?
She probably took after her mother.
I can't quite grasp what she's thinking.
Did she say that Jennifer is the culprit because she harbors resentment against her?
Or does she genuinely believe that?
I guess that sharp gaze is probably the cause of misunderstandings.
She's a person with a lot of bad rumors surrounding her, but talking to her doesn't evoke an extreme villain image.
Maybe they're spreading rumors out of jealousy over how close she is with Jennifer.
It's surprising that even (they) think Jennifer is the culprit.
I've heard that (he) gets along well with Jennifer.
Isn't that different?
Is (she) expressionless or just cool?
She feels a bit eerie.
A woman who holds a grudge against Guy.
I also seem to be garnering some resentment, maybe she’s the type who hates men.
But,
it seems that this woman is
the type who becomes abnormal when it comes to (him).
In (her) world,
it wouldn’t be an exaggeration to say it revolves around (him).
Though (she) sells herself as a cute character, I wonder if her real self is totally different.
If given the chance, I'd like to chat slowly with her.
That said,
it seems (he) wouldn't let that happen.
Let's pray that (she) can succeed as an actress.
I don't feel like she’s involved in any crime.
Even if such an incident really happened, who knows whether it was an accident or not.
Is it that (she) often faces defamation because of that incident?
She surprised me, looking like a pure and gentle woman, contrary to her role's image.
Jennifer is
The Structure of Madness
a rising actress who shot to fame starring in the movie.
Meryl is a well-established actress known for her high acting ability, being in her 30s.
She carries herself with dignity and has the aura of a great actress.
It seems the rumor that Meryl and the director are having a romantic relationship is true.
The director is often said to be difficult in the public’s image, but talking to him, he’s quite gentle.
When it comes to filming the movie, he might change completely, but I didn’t get that impression.
Guy is really a pain.
Recently, we had drifted apart since he got busy, so I hadn’t known about his recent situation.
I wonder if Guy,
has come to hate me?
He's probably able to be so confident because he has such a strong sense of pride.
However, beneath that appearance, I think he's going through a lot mentally.
After the party is over, I'll make some time to listen to him slowly.
I wonder if I was able to talk to Guy?
※※※ It’s a bug ※※※
